fields.acceptance_criteria: EventSource client via web-sys connecting to /api/stream; handles ticket.upsert, ticket.delete, edge.upsert, edge.delete events; updates ticket list and graph reactively; reconnection on disconnect; snapshot.ready baseline
fields.title: Port: SSE integration for real-time ticket updates

fields.acceptance_criteria: EventSource client via web-sys connecting to /api/stream; handles ticket.upsert, ticket.delete, edge.upsert, edge.delete events; reconnects on disconnect with exponential backoff; updates ticket list and graph reactively via Dioxus signals; NOTE: EventSource API cannot send Authorization headers — auth token must be passed as a query parameter (e.g. /api/stream?token=...) or the implementation must switch to fetch+ReadableStream; document chosen approach in implementation notes
fields.title: Port: SSE integration for real-time ticket updates
